channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Google Genie + Street View : cette IA veut générer GTA dans n’importe quelle ville du monde
item.description: Google renforce son IA dédiée à la génération de mondes interactifs avec toutes les données provenant de Street View, et donc du monde réel.

item.title: Google rêve d’une utilisation transparente et honnête de l’IA
item.description: Lors de la Google I/O 2026, Google a réitéré son souhait de voir l'IA être utilisée de façon transparente grâce à des technologies comme C2PA et SynthID.

item.title: Toutes les nouveautés Gemini : regardez la Google I/O 2026 en direct
item.description: Suivez en direct la Google I/O 2026 qui promet de dévoiler de nombreuses évolutions de l'intelligence artificielle Gemini. Voici comment regarder la conférence.

item.title: Impôts 2026 : comment déclarer ses revenus sur smartphone et gagner du temps ?
item.description: Le temps est venu de déclarer vos revenus de 2025 pour le calcul des impôts de 2026. Bonne nouvelle, vous pouvez le faire très rapidement sur votre smartphone avec l'application Impots.gouv, à condition de respecter certaines conditions.

item.title: Gemini will use Volvo’s external cameras to interpret parking signs
item.description: Gemini is gaining the power of sight and mobility. Today at the I/O conference, Google and Volvo announced that the AI-powered assistant will be able to access external cameras in the upcoming EX60 SUV to help explain and interpret its surroundings to vehicle owners. The upgrade is possible thanks to Volvo's use of Google's embedded […]

item.title: What is the release date for Hacks season 5 episode 9 on HBO Max?
item.description: Deborah is desperately trying to get her Madison Square Garden ticket sales moving, despite being tough graft. But when does Hacks season 5 episode 9 drop on HBO Max?

item.title: Google’s Universal Cart uses Gemini AI to find deals and product restocks — and it might change the way you shop forever
item.description: Google’s new Universal Cart taps into AI to help you get better online shopping deals at checkout.

item.title: Google I/O completely forgot Pixel VPN — here's the Android alternative I'd recommend to secure your personal data
item.description: Google might have put your data privacy on the backburner, but this VPN hasn't

item.title: Xbox Game Pass additions for late May include Forza Horizon 6 and Remnant II
item.description: The first-person adventure Luna Abyss is also a day-one release.

item.title: The 13 biggest announcements at Google I/O 2026
item.description: Google's I/O 2026 keynote today was once again full of AI-related announcements including a new family of Gemini 3.5 AI models, new features for Search and Gmail, and updates about its Project Aura smart glasses. If you weren't able to tune into the event's livestream today or follow along with our live blog, you can […]

item.title: Google Gemini se dote de Daily Brief, un résumé quotidien généré par l’IA
item.description: Google annonce Daily Brief, un nouvel agent d'IA prêt à l'emploi directement intégré à l'application Gemini. Il compile les informations urgentes durant la nuit pour fournir un résumé personnalisé chaque matin.

item.title: Fin des limites sur Gemini : la décision de Google qui va pénaliser les requêtes complexes
item.description: Google abandonne ses limites quotidiennes de requêtes pour l'application Gemini. À la place, un système basé sur la puissance de calcul réellement consommée fait son apparition, accompagné d'une option pay-as-you-go.

item.title: Google’s Genie world model can now simulate real streets with Street View
item.description: Google DeepMind is integrating Street View with Project Genie to create immersive, interactive world simulations for robotics, gaming, and travel, allowing users to explore environments, weather changes, and rare scenarios.

item.title: With Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google bets its next AI wave on agents, not chatbots
item.description: Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash, its most powerful coding and agentic AI model yet, at the company's annual developer conference. It is capable of autonomously executing complex tasks and building software from scratch.

item.title: YouTube : voici comment Gemini vous aidera bientôt à trouver les meilleures vidéos
item.description: Dans le cadre de la grande masse de la Google I/O, YouTube accueille deux nouvelles fonctionnalités pour faciliter la recherche de contenus, mais aussi la création de contenus.

item.title: How to use Google’s new information agents
item.description: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.

item.title: Google AI casse en deux le prix de son abonnement et offre YouTube Premium
item.description: Google a annoncé une refonte des abonnements à Gemini. Au programme : l'apparition d'un forfait intermédiaire baptisé « AI Ultra Lite », l'intégration de YouTube Premium Lite dans la formule Pro et des ajustements tarifaires.

item.title: Google wants to compete with Anthropic’s Mythos
item.description: Google is making a big push into cybersecurity. At I/O, the company announced that it was inviting select groups of experts to test the API for CodeMender, an "AI agent for code security" it debuted last October. The difference is that Google is now making the tool more widely available externally - and marketing it […]

item.title: Gmail, Docs, Keep : Google métamorphose Workspace à la voix pour vous faciliter le travail
item.description: Tous les outils liés à Google Workspace (Gmail, Docs, Keep) vont désormais intégrer les outils conversationnels de Gemini pour optimiser votre productivité au quotidien.

item.title: Google Shopping : votre panier vérifie automatiquement que votre processeur est compatible avec votre carte mère
item.description: Google repense entièrement l'expérience d'achat en ligne avec trois nouveautés dévoilées à sa conférence I/O 2026 : un panier intelligent baptisé Universal Cart, un protocole pour que les marchands et les IA se comprennent entre eux, et un système sécurisé pour laisser un agent payer à votre place.

item.title: Gemini Spark : votre nouveau secrétaire personnel travaille 24h/24 et anticipe tous vos besoins
item.description: Google a officialisé Gemini Spark pendant la Google I/O 2026. C'est un agent IA surpuissant qui tourne 24h/24 dans le cloud en accédant à vos apps Google comme Gmail pour anticiper tous vos besoins de manière autonome.

item.title: How to watch Falling online for free – stream Jack Thorne's romantic drama from anywhere
item.description: A devoted nun falls for a Catholic priest in Adolescence writer Jack Thorne's romantic drama. Here's how to watch Falling online from anywhere.

item.title: Google Search as you know it is over
item.description: Google is transforming Search from a list of links into an AI-powered experience filled with conversational answers, autonomous agents, and interactive interfaces — a shift that could further reduce traffic to publishers across the web.

item.title: Samsung et Google défient les Ray-Ban Meta avec des lunettes connectées nouvelle génération
item.description: Samsung et Google s'attaquent officiellement au marché des lunettes connectées, essentiellement représenté par les Meta Ray-Ban pour le moment. Android XR et Gemini sont embarqués.

item.title: Google Pics : Google lance un outil de retouche d’image dopé à l’IA « Nano Banana »
item.description: Google présente une toute nouvelle application d'édition et de traitement d'images lors de la Google I/O. Google Pics promet de rendre accessibles les opérations les plus complexes grâce au modèle de génération d'images Nano Banana.

item.title: « Une étape décisive » : voici Gemini Omni, l’IA la plus importante pour l’avenir de Google ?
item.description: Google a officialisé Gemini Omni pendant la Google I/O 2026. Une IA qui ne se contente plus de fabriquer des vidéos depuis du texte et qui veut carrément remixer la réalité en vous insérant à l'envi dans les contenus générés.

item.title: Google et Samsung frappent fort : ces lunettes connectées passent totalement inaperçues
item.description: Samsung et Google dévoilent leurs premières lunettes connectées sous Android XR, attendues pour l'automne 2026. Ces lunettes, co-développées avec Gentle Monster et Warby Parker, visent à être discrètes et fonctionnelles, sans remplacer le smartphone. Elles intègrent l'IA Gemini pour des interactions mains libres, simplifiant les tâches quotidiennes et s'inscrivant dans l'écosystème Galaxy....

item.title: Google Makes It Easy to Deepfake Yourself
item.description: Google’s overhaul of its AI creation software, Flow, includes a new video model and a tool for generating selfie videos called avatars.

item.title: Hands-On With All of Google’s New Upcoming Android XR Smart Glasses
item.description: Here's your first look at smart glasses coming from Warby Parker and Gentle Monster, powered by Google and Samsung's XR platform.

item.title: Demis Hassabis Thinks AI Job Cuts Are Dumb
item.description: The CEO of Google DeepMind tells WIRED that companies should use the productivity gains of AI to do more, not lay people off.

item.title: Google Search Goes Agentic—and Doesn’t Need You Anymore
item.description: Vibe-coded results! Super widgets! Bots that never sleep! Google’s vision for the future of Search is hyper-personalized, automated, and extremely AI.

item.title: Google’s Response to OpenClaw’s 24/7 AI Agent
item.description: Google’s always-running, data-hungry AI agent is designed to spend your money and send your emails.

item.title: Google can now vibe-code you an Android app
item.description: Google is announcing a major upgrade to one of its vibe coding platforms: Beginning today, you can now use AI Studio to build native Android apps. With Google AI Studio, you can prompt your idea for an app and preview it with an embedded emulator of Android. When you want to try it out on […]

item.title: Would you let robots spend your money? Google is betting on it
item.description: Google is going all in on AI-driven shopping even as some competitors back off. At Google I/O, the company unveiled the latest iteration of its AI commerce tools: a "Universal Cart" that works across different retailers and Google products like Gemini - and eventually YouTube and Gmail, too. Users can add products to Google's universal […]

item.title: Google Search is getting its biggest changes ever
item.description: Google Search is entering the next phase of its AI evolution. During Google I/O 2026, the company showed off a reimagined search box that makes it easier to flow between AI Overviews, the AI-generated summaries that appear at the top of search results, and AI Mode, Google's chatbot-like search experience. Powered by the new Gemini […]

item.title: Gmail is going to start talking to you
item.description: Google is launching a big new feature for Gmail called Gmail Live, a new AI-powered voice mode that's basically the Gemini Live experience but built specifically for your inbox. To use Gmail Live, tap an icon that will appear in your search bar and just start talking. In a press briefing, a Google employee showed […]

item.title: Google is launching its own version of OpenClaw
item.description: Google is launching its own take on OpenClaw, the buzzy AI agent platform that caused a stir in the tech industry earlier this year. Announced during Google I/O 2026, Gemini Spark is an always-on AI agent that can write emails for you, create continually updated study guides, monitor credit card statements for hidden subscription fees, […]

item.title: Google Pics is a new app that tries to fix AI image editing
item.description: Google is launching a new AI image generation app to Workspace that it's calling Pics, and it has a new feature to try and reduce the hassle of iterating on AI images: Instead of having to write an entire prompt just to change one small aspect of an image, you'll be able to click on […]

item.title: A first (and second) look at the Android XR glasses launching this year
item.description: I first put on a pair of prototype Android XR glasses nearly a year and a half ago. We still have months to go before any Android-powered smart glasses are available, but Google is finally ready to show off the progress it's made. That starts with Project Aura, a dark pair of sunglasses that sits […]

item.title: Google’s AI now lets you talk to your Gmail inbox
item.description: Google expands Gmail’s AI Inbox with conversational voice search, letting users ask Gemini to find buried email details.

item.title: Google’s AI Studio now lets anyone build Android apps in minutes
item.description: Google unveiled new web-based AI tools that can generate native Android apps in minutes, as the company expands its push into AI-powered software development.

item.title: Google just declared itself a contender in AI design
item.description: The tech giant says it's designed the app to be accessible to everyone, from teachers to small business owners.

item.title: Google updates its Gemini app to take on ChatGPT and Claude
item.description: The updates signal Google’s push to turn its Gemini app into an all-purpose AI hub rather than a stand-alone chatbot.

item.title: Agentic app coding gets an upgrade with Google’s release of Android CLI
item.description: Google is embracing the rise of AI coding agents with new Android tools designed to work with platforms like Claude Code and OpenAI’s Codex, allowing developers — or their AI assistants — to build Android apps faster from the command line.

item.title: Google’s new Universal Cart wants to follow you across the entire internet
item.description: The tech giant says it's aware that most people shop across multiple devices, many retailers, and over the course of many days, which is why it's launching Universal Cart.

item.title: Google introduces Gemini Spark, a 24/7 agentic assistant with Gmail integration
item.description: At the I/O developer conference, Google announced a new agentic personal assistant called Gemini Spark, built from Gemini's base models and an agentic harness from Google Antigravity.

item.title: Google adds voice-based prompting to Docs and Keep
item.description: Google is letting users create drafts, take notes, and search for email with voice with the new Workspace update

item.title: Google launches Antigravity 2.0 with an updated desktop app and CLI tool
item.description: Google is debuting a new AI Ultra plan priced at $100, which will give users 5x more usage limit than the AI Pro plan alongside Antigravity 2.0 launch.

item.title: Google’s Gemini Omni turns images, audio, and text into video — and that’s just the start
item.description: Google's Gemini Omni is a new multimodal model that reasons across text, images, audio, and video to generate and edit videos through simple conversation — starting with Omni Flash.

item.title: OpenAI is making it easier to check if an image was made by their models
item.description: OpenAI announced two new measures to help detect AI generated imagery: joining the open C2PA standard and adding Google's SynthID to its products.

item.title: Google just turned YouTube into an AI chatbot, with a new 'Ask YouTube' feature that finds the perfect video
item.description: You'll soon be able to talk to YouTube using Gemini, giving you a new way to find what you're looking for.

item.title: Google's Gemini Spark is an agentic AI assistant
item.description: The AI agent is rolling out to testers this week.

item.title: Google's redesigned Gemini comes with a new interface and AI models
item.description: Google's redesigned chatbot hits Android and iOS today.

item.title: Google's Gemini Omni can generate 'anything from any input,' starting with video
item.description: Google didn't forget AI creators in its latest round of Gemini announcements.

item.title: Google says Gemini 3.5 Flash rivals 'large flagship models' for coding and agentic tasks
item.description: Google says its Gemini 3.5 Flash model can complete tasks in a "fraction of the time" of other frontier models.

item.title: I/O 2026 is bringing more AI to Google Play
item.description: Play Games Sidekick is also getting a wider rollout.

item.title: The Google AI Ultra plan now starts at $100 a month
item.description: Google's most expensive AI plan is now a little cheaper.

item.title: Google's newest app is an AI-powered image editor
item.description: Google Pics isn't Photoshop, but it could be better than what's in Google Photos.

item.title: Google's Universal Cart will keep an eye on your shopping
item.description: Universal Cart will make it easier to buy from inside YouTube and Gmail.

item.title: Project Genie adds Google Street View integration and goes live for global AI Ultra users
item.description: Ground your snow-globe worlds in real-world locations from Google Maps.

item.title: Google's Circle to Search feature can tell you if an image was AI-generated
item.description: Google is bringing its AI-detecting feature to more of its products to make it easier for people to verify if something was generated or edited with AI.

item.title: Google shoves more AI into Search, including a dynamic Search box and agentic features
item.description: You can kiss the classic Google Search goodbye.

item.title: Samsung and Google just teased their upcoming Android XR smartglasses at Google I/O
item.description: The two models were created in partnership with Warby Parker and Gentle Monster.

item.title: Google says Gemini 3.5 Flash can slash enterprise AI costs by more than $1 billion a year
item.description: Google unveiled Gemini 3.5 Flash at its annual I/O developer conference on Tuesday, a new artificial intelligence model that the company says shatters what had become a seemingly iron law of the AI industry: that the smartest models must also be the slowest and most expensive to run.The model sits at the center of a sweeping set of announcements — from a video-generating "world model" called Gemini Omni to a 24/7 personal AI agent called Gemini Spark — but 3.5 Flash carries perhaps the most immediate consequence for the enterprises pouring billions of dollars into AI infrastructure. Sundar Pic...

item.title: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
item.description: For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a list of blue links. On Tuesday, Google will formally retire that paradigm.At its annual I/O developer conference, Google announced a sweeping redesign of the search box itself — the literal text field where billions of queries begin every day — transforming it from a simple keyword input into a dynamic, AI-driven conversation starter that can accept text, images, PDFs, videos, and even open Chrome tabs as inputs. The com...

item.title: Google’s new AI agent can draft your emails, monitor your inbox and eventually spend your money
item.description: Google on Tuesday unveiled Gemini Spark, a personal AI agent designed to work around the clock — drafting emails, assembling documents, monitoring inboxes, and eventually making purchases — even when a user's laptop is closed and their phone is locked.The announcement, made at Google I/O 2026, is the company's most ambitious attempt yet to transform its AI assistant from a tool that answers questions into one that autonomously completes tasks. It also arrives at a moment of extraordinary competition, as Microsoft, OpenAI, Anthropic, and Apple all race to build AI systems that don't merely conv...

item.title: Google I/O 2026 | Google lance Gemini Omni et promet une IA beaucoup moins gourmande
item.description: L’édition 2026 de la conférence annuelle des développeurs Google I/O n’est pas différente des précédentes. Et pourtant, elle pourrait être la plus mémorable. Google passe à l’offensive contre OpenAI et Anthropic avec des agents d’IA plus autonomes, plus pertinents et beaucoup moins énergivores que leurs prédécesseurs.

item.title: Google Gemini 3.5 Flash est là : plus intelligent, plus rapide, plus abordable
item.description: Google présente Gemini 3.5 et tout particulièrement Gemini 3.5 Flash. Ce modèle est plus rapide, moins cher et déployé partout dans l'écosystème Google.

item.title: Google unveils Gemini Omni 'any-to-any' AI model: what enterprises should know
item.description: Although it was already discovered by intrepid AI power users weeks ahead of the official unveiling today at Google's annual I/O developer conference, the company's new Gemini Omni model marks a significantly new paradigm in the wider AI and tech marketplace.That's because as its "omni" (from the Latin omne — meaning "all") prefix would suggest, this is Google's first truly native, multimodal model, that is "a model that can create anything from any input — starting with video." The model marks Google's bid to collapse the multimodal generative stack — text-to-image, image-to-video, video-to-v...

item.title: Arizona data centers raise Phoenix temperatures by up to 4 degrees – air cooled data centers are creating thermal plumes that exacerbate public health risks and compound heat output in towns and cities
item.description: Data center cooling is making the rest towns and cities hotter - here's what needs to be done

item.title: The latest Xbox thumbstick topper looks like a goal post
item.description: Xbox's new "goal post" thumbstick topper joins six other designs for people with disabilities.

item.title: The economic power of narrative storytelling
item.description: How a city talks about itself and its residents can shape its economic equity and resilience. When we talk about infrastructure for a local economy, most people picture roads, sewer pipes, broadband, or parks. But there is an invisible type of infrastructure that shapes where capital flows and which businesses are considered investable. These are the narratives shape how a city talks about itself and its people....

item.title: Google brings more conversational features to Gmail, Docs and Keep
item.description: You can talk out a first draft of a document, and Docs will organize your thoughts for you.

item.title: Google I/O 2026 live updates: See the latest reveals, including Gemini, Android XR, more
item.description: Mashable will be providing live updates on Google I/O 2026 and the latest updates to Gemini, Android XR glasses, Workspace, Android, and Chrome.

item.title: Ask YouTube compiles video answers to your questions
item.description: Google's new Ask YouTube feature will pull together short- and long-form content.

item.title: The housing market quietly changed — and buyers who gave up may want to look again
item.description: Down payments are falling, FHA and VA loans are surging, and competition is finally cooling in many cities. One small glimmer of hope for anyone hoping to buy a home soon: You might not need as much cash as you would have in years past.

item.title: Plex's lifetime subscription cost is tripling to $750
item.description: Plex's premium plan will triple on June 30, 8:01PM ET.

item.title: Snag the Beatbot Sora 70 robotic pool cleaner at a record-low price at Amazon — save $350
item.description: The Beatbot Sora 70 robotic pool cleaner is on sale at Amazon for $1,149, down from the standard price of $1,499. That's a 23% discount.

item.title: The Apple Watch Ultra 4 is tipped to get a new way to keep your heart healthy — but there’s a catch
item.description: The Apple Watch Ultra 4 might get a new blood pressure alert feature, a report claims.

item.title: Looks like The Witcher 4 work isn't holding back multiplayer spinoff Project Sirius — it just picked up the narrative lead of one of Destiny 2's best expansions
item.description: CD Projekt Red's multiplayer Witcher spin-off, Project Sirius, has found its lead writer in Destiny 2: The Final Shape's narrative head, Kwan Perng.

item.title: Want to know more about Sony’s most expensive wireless headphones ever? Our audio experts have the lowdown
item.description: After testing Sony’s most expensive wireless headphones ever, we're letting you ask our audio experts anything you want to know about them in a live Q&A.

item.title: Upgrade your gaming setup with $600 off the Samsung Odyssey Neo G9 monitor
item.description: As of May 19, save $600 on the Samsung Odyssey Neo G9 gaming monitor.

item.title: Powerful vacuuming, mopping, and self-cleaning — Dreame's latest robovacs are packed with premium features, cost a lot less than you might expect, and are available in the UK right now
item.description: Dreame has unveiled two new robot vaccums with built-in mopping. They're significantly more powerful than before but come with competitive price tags

item.title: Microsoft finally ends using SMS codes for account sign-in — with passkeys officially taking over
item.description: Microsoft believes that the future of authentication is passwordless, secure, and user-friendly.

item.title: The Philips Café Aromis makes the best oat milk latte I've ever had from a home coffee maker — and it looks great as well
item.description: This 'conversational' coffee maker talks you through choosing the right settings, and transforms even plant-based milks into thick, creamy foam in seconds.

item.title: Forget the Apple Watch Ultra 3, this E Ink smartwatch offers 400 days of juice to obliterate its battery rivals
item.description: The LightInk smartwatch has 400 days of battery life, but some serious compromises too

item.title: Il branche une RTX 5090 sur un MacBook Air et fait tourner Cyberpunk
item.description: Un MacBook Air M4 qui fait tourner Cyberpunk 2077 en 4K avec ray tracing grâce à une carte graphique desktop branchée en externe. L'exploit est réel, la méthode est déraisonnable.

item.title: Nintendo's wacky new mobile game takes inspiration from WarioWare
item.description: The free-to-download Pictonico! turns photos into minigames.

item.title: OpenAI co-founder Andrej Karpathy announces he's joining Anthropic
item.description: Andrej Karpathy, the influential 39-year-old Slovak-Canadian AI researcher and one of the original 11 co-founders of OpenAI, and former head of Tesla's AI division, announced on Tuesday, May 19 that he's joining rival lab Anthropic.As Karpathy posted from his account on the social network X: "Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D. I remain deeply passionate about education and plan to resume my work on it in time."Anthropic's current Head of Pretraining...

item.title: LG reveals 'world's first native 1,000Hz' gaming monitor — but good luck trying to find a GPU to drive it without breaking the bank
item.description: LG's 1,000Hz gaming monitor is designed for shooters with tech that 'makes fast-moving objects sharper and easier to track'.
